name: fractal-monorepo
comment: packages/codegen (types+JSDoc → runtime schema extractor) was merged into packages/type-ir — extract/tree/compile/cli are type-ir concerns. packages/openapi-api-projector and packages/client-api-projector were both merged into packages/http-api-projector (2026-07-18) — OpenAPI and the runtime HTTP client both only ever describe/consume HTTP APIs, so they're HTTP concerns, not separate projections; see TODO.md.
